applypendingmaintenanceaction.name: ApplyPendingMaintenanceAction
applypendingmaintenanceaction.description: Grants permission to apply pending maintenance actions on Amazon DocDB-Elastic cluster

copyclustersnapshot.name: CopyClusterSnapshot
copyclustersnapshot.description: Grants permission to copy a new Amazon DocDB-Elastic cluster snapshot

createcluster.name: CreateCluster
createcluster.description: Grants permission to create a new Amazon DocDB-Elastic cluster

createclustersnapshot.name: CreateClusterSnapshot
createclustersnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a new Amazon DocDB-Elastic cluster snapshot

deletecluster.name: DeleteCluster
deletecluster.description: Grants permission to delete a cluster

deleteclustersnapshot.name: DeleteClusterSnapshot
deleteclustersnapshot.description: Grants permission to delete a cluster snapshot

getcluster.name: GetCluster
getcluster.description: Grants permission to view details about a cluster

getclustersnapshot.name: GetClusterSnapshot
getclustersnapshot.description: Grants permission to view details about a cluster snapshot

getpendingmaintenanceaction.name: GetPendingMaintenanceAction
getpendingmaintenanceaction.description: Grants permission to view details about pending maintenance actions on Amazon DocDB-Elastic cluster

listclustersnapshots.name: ListClusterSnapshots
listclustersnapshots.description: Grants permission to list the cluster snapshots in your account

listclusters.name: ListClusters
listclusters.description: Grants permission to list the clusters in your account

listpendingmaintenanceactions.name: ListPendingMaintenanceActions
listpendingmaintenanceactions.description: Grants permission to list details about pending maintenance actions on any Amazon DocDB-Elastic cluster

listtagsforresource.name: ListTagsForResource
listtagsforresource.description: Grants permission to lists tag for an DocumentDB Elastic resource

restoreclusterfromsnapshot.name: RestoreClusterFromSnapshot
restoreclusterfromsnapshot.description: Grants permission to restore cluster from a Amazon DocDB-Elastic cluster snapshot

startcluster.name: StartCluster
startcluster.description: Grants permission to start a stopped Amazon DocDB-Elastic cluster

stopcluster.name: StopCluster
stopcluster.description: Grants permission to stop an existing Amazon DocDB-Elastic cluster

tagresource.name: TagResource
tagresource.description: Grants permission to tag an DocumentDB Elastic resource

untagresource.name: UntagResource
untagresource.description: Grants permission to untag a DocumentDB Elastic resource

updatecluster.name: UpdateCluster
updatecluster.description: Grants permission to modify a cluster
